products.name: Cevo Exotic Assortment
products.shortDescription: A vibrant mix of exotic flavoured drinks. Bold taste, eye-catching packaging, and perfect for sharing.
products.description: Cevo Exotic Assortment brings together a range of exotic flavoured drinks in one convenient pack. Bold, refreshing taste profiles and eye-catching packaging make it an easy grab for anyone looking for something a little different. Great for sharing, stocking the fridge, or enjoying on the go.

products.name: Felon Innovation Milk Drink
products.shortDescription: A smooth, nutritious milk drink for any time of day. Great taste and real goodness in every sip.
products.description: Felon Innovation Milk Drink is a smooth, creamy milk-based drink packed with nutrition. Whether you need a quick breakfast option or a satisfying snack, this drink delivers great taste and real goodness in every sip. Loved by both adults and kids.

products.name: Madala Juice Range
products.shortDescription: Fresh-tasting juice in a range of fruity flavours — made for everyday refreshment.
products.description: Madala Juice brings fresh, fruity refreshment in a variety of flavours. Made with natural goodness and a clean taste profile, it is the kind of everyday drink that belongs in every household fridge. Light, satisfying, and great for the whole family.

products.name: Orisirisi Catering Drinks
products.shortDescription: A versatile drinks assortment for home, catering, and events. Crowd-pleasing flavours in one pack.
products.description: Orisirisi Catering Drinks is a crowd-pleasing selection of drinks ideal for home, events, and catering use. With a range of popular flavours in generous quantities, it is the go-to choice when you need variety and reliability in one convenient order.

products.name: Wilson's Juice Co. Range
products.shortDescription: One of Nigeria's favourite juice brands — fruity, fresh, and full of flavour.
products.description: Wilson's Juice Co. is one of Nigeria's most recognised juice brands. Fruity, fresh, and full of natural flavour, the Wilson's range has become a household staple trusted by families across Lagos and beyond. Stocked in over 300 stores for good reason.

products.name: Kezia Mixed Beverage Line
products.shortDescription: A premium mixed beverage selection across popular flavours — great alongside any meal.
products.description: Kezia Mixed Beverage Line is a premium selection of drinks across a range of popular flavours. Whether enjoyed on its own or paired with a meal, the Kezia range brings quality taste and satisfying refreshment with every bottle.

products.name: Zayith Yogurt Selection
products.shortDescription: Smooth, creamy yoghurt in fruity flavours — naturally rich and great for breakfast.
products.description: Zayith Yogurt is smooth, creamy, and available in a range of fruit flavours. Naturally rich in probiotics and made for everyday eating, it is a great choice for breakfast, a healthy snack, or as a treat any time of day.

products.name: Aman-Bless Wellness Range
products.shortDescription: A trusted daily wellness and personal care collection for the whole family.
products.description: Aman-Bless Wellness Range is a complete daily care collection designed for the whole family. From wellness essentials to personal care products, every item is gentle, effective, and made to support a healthier everyday routine.

products.name: Biniowan Enterprises Care Kit
products.shortDescription: Everyday personal care essentials — gentle on skin and great on price.
products.description: Biniowan Enterprises Care Kit has everything you need for daily personal hygiene and skin care. Gentle formulas, practical packaging, and great value make this care kit a reliable choice for every household.

products.name: Tosh Cocodia Wellness Drink
products.shortDescription: A refreshing coconut-based wellness drink — light, clean, and good for you.
products.description: Tosh Cocodia Wellness Drink is a refreshing, coconut-based drink loaded with natural ingredients. Light and clean with a smooth natural flavour, it is the kind of wellness drink you can feel good about reaching for every day.

products.name: Respite Tea Duo
products.shortDescription: Two calming tea blends in one set — perfect for winding down after a long day.
products.description: Respite Tea Duo brings together two soothing tea blends in one convenient set. Made with natural ingredients and gentle flavour profiles, it is exactly what you need after a long day. Warm, calming, and completely natural.

products.name: Whole Eats Africa Meditea
products.shortDescription: An herbal wellness tea crafted from African botanicals — soothing and naturally made.
products.description: Whole Eats Africa Meditea is an herbal wellness tea crafted from carefully selected African botanicals. Naturally brewed, gently flavoured, and rich in wellness benefits, it makes a wonderful addition to any healthy daily routine.

products.name: Whole Eats Africa Infant Care
products.shortDescription: Gentle natural infant care products formulated for sensitive baby skin.
products.description: Whole Eats Africa Infant Care is a range of gentle, natural products designed specifically for babies' delicate skin. Formulated without harsh chemicals and trusted by parents who want only the best for their little ones from day one.

products.name: August Secrets Infant Range
products.shortDescription: A premium infant care range made with safe, skin-friendly ingredients.
products.description: August Secrets Infant Range is a premium collection of baby care products developed for sensitive infant skin. Safe ingredients, gentle formulas, and thoughtful packaging make it a go-to choice for parents who take no chances with their baby's care.

products.name: Atun Foods Pantry Pair
products.shortDescription: Two pantry essentials in one pack — stock up on what your kitchen needs most.
products.description: Atun Foods Pantry Pair brings together two everyday kitchen essentials in one convenient pack. Whether you are stocking up for the week or topping up the pantry, this duo gives you what you need at a value that makes sense.

products.name: Cresso Life Pantry Line
products.shortDescription: Quality grains, cereals, and kitchen basics — reliable, affordable, and always in demand.
products.description: Cresso Life Pantry Line is a well-rounded range of household food staples including grains, cereals, and kitchen basics. Reliable quality, practical sizing, and affordable pricing make it a consistent favourite in Nigerian households.

products.name: Eti Farms Rice Choice
products.shortDescription: Premium quality rice from a trusted Nigerian farm brand — perfect for everyday cooking.
products.description: Eti Farms Rice Choice delivers premium quality rice from one of Nigeria's trusted farm brands. Clean, well-milled, and consistently good, it is the kind of rice that earns a permanent spot in every family kitchen.

products.name: JKB Plantain Flour
products.shortDescription: Pure naturally milled plantain flour — great for swallow, porridge, and Nigerian dishes.
products.description: JKB Plantain Flour is a pure, naturally milled flour made from quality plantain. Smooth texture and clean taste make it perfect for swallow, porridge, and a variety of Nigerian recipes. A kitchen staple for every home that loves traditional cooking.

products.name: Mazara Cereal Selection
products.shortDescription: A nutritious breakfast cereal range for the whole family — crunchy and full of flavour.
products.description: Mazara Cereal Selection is a delicious range of breakfast cereals made to start your day right. Crunchy, flavourful, and nutritious, it is the kind of morning staple the whole family looks forward to. Great with milk, yoghurt, or straight from the box.

products.name: Prothrive Grandios Range
products.shortDescription: Protein-rich pantry staples for health-conscious households — nutritious and great-tasting.
products.description: Prothrive Grandios Range is a premium collection of protein-rich pantry staples built for households that care about nutrition. Well-balanced, great-tasting, and made to support an active, health-forward lifestyle without sacrificing flavour.

products.name: Tosh Cocodia Pantry Range
products.shortDescription: A coconut-inspired pantry range — versatile, nutritious, and uniquely Nigerian.
products.description: Tosh Cocodia Pantry Range brings natural coconut flavour into your everyday cooking. Versatile enough for soups, swallows, and baking, this uniquely Nigerian range adds a clean, natural depth to every dish while keeping your pantry stocked with something special.

products.name: Zeef Rice Flour
products.shortDescription: Finely milled rice flour for swallow, thickening, and baking — smooth and great for everyday use.
products.description: Zeef Rice Flour is a finely milled, high-quality rice flour suitable for swallow, thickening soups, and baking. Smooth texture, clean taste, and consistent quality make it a reliable everyday choice for Nigerian kitchens.

products.name: Eloha Dates Range
products.shortDescription: Premium natural dates — naturally sweet, energy-boosting, and perfect for healthy snacking.
products.description: Eloha Dates Range brings premium natural dates in a variety of sizes and selections. Naturally sweet, energy-boosting, and packed with nutrients, they are the perfect healthy snack for any time of day — at home, at work, or on the go.

products.name: B-Boon Snack Selection
products.shortDescription: A fun snack selection packed with popular flavours — great for all ages.
products.description: B-Boon Snack Selection is a crowd-pleasing mix of snacks in popular flavours and textures. Great for kids, adults, lunchboxes, and afternoon cravings, it is the kind of snack variety pack that never lasts long once it is in the house.

products.name: Tosh Cocodia Snack Jar
products.shortDescription: Coconut-infused snacks in a convenient jar — light, crunchy, and naturally flavoured.
products.description: Tosh Cocodia Snack Jar is a jar of light, crunchy snacks infused with natural coconut flavour. Easy to take anywhere and satisfying at any time, it is the perfect companion for healthy snacking that actually tastes great.

products.name: Skiddo Foods Happy Treat
products.shortDescription: A delightful treat the whole family looks forward to — fun flavours, great crunch.
products.description: Skiddo Foods Happy Treat is a fun, delicious snack designed to bring a smile to everyone's face. Packed with great flavour and satisfying crunch, it works for kids and adults equally well — at home, school, or anywhere you need a pick-me-up.

products.name: Atun Foods Pepper Soup Spice
products.shortDescription: Authentic Nigerian pepper soup spice blend — earthy, aromatic, and perfectly balanced.
products.description: Atun Foods Pepper Soup Spice is an authentic Nigerian spice blend crafted for a truly rich pepper soup. Earthy, aromatic, and perfectly balanced, it brings the real flavour of Nigerian cooking to your pot every time — no guesswork, just great taste.

products.name: Dizauregi Spice Range
products.shortDescription: A full range of Nigerian spices and seasonings for everyday cooking — bold flavour, clean ingredients.
products.description: Dizauregi Spice Range covers the full spectrum of everyday Nigerian seasonings. Bold flavours, clean natural ingredients, and consistent quality make this range a kitchen staple for anyone who takes their cooking seriously.

products.name: Sooyah Food Spice Line
products.shortDescription: Versatile Nigerian seasonings from soups to stews — bring out the best in every dish.
products.description: Sooyah Food Spice Line is a versatile collection of seasonings and blends made for Nigerian kitchens. Whether you are making soup, stew, or rice, these spices know exactly what your dish needs to taste right.

products.name: Zeef Condiments Selection
products.shortDescription: Premium condiments for everyday cooking — flavourful, balanced, and made to elevate every meal.
products.description: Zeef Condiments Selection is a premium range of condiments built to elevate everyday meals. Flavourful, well-balanced, and versatile, each product in the selection makes it easy to turn a good meal into a great one.

products.name: Kitchensmith Household Essentials
products.shortDescription: Everything you need to keep your home running smoothly — practical and great value.
products.description: Kitchensmith Household Essentials covers the practical items every home depends on. Durable, functional, and priced to make sense, this range keeps your household running smoothly without stretching the budget.
